experiment_6.Task: Cluster single-cell RNA-seq data in Galaxy and produce cluster and marker-gene visualizations.
experiment_6.Prompt: I have three files from a single-cell experiment and want to use Galaxy to cluster cells and inspect marker genes, but I am not sure which workflow to use. Please choose a suitable Galaxy approach, run it, and for reproducibility report the normalization tool, the genes shown in the dotplot of top genes on clusters, and the number of workflow tool steps in the workflow you actually ran.
